scripts.build: npm run build:assets && npm run build:site
scripts.build:assets: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.build:css: sass assets/_styles/style.scss assets/_styles/build/style.css --no-source-map --style=expanded --silence-deprecation=import,global-builtin,slash-div,elseif && postcss assets/_styles/build/style.css --no-map -o assets/css/style.css
scripts.build:site: LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 bundle exec jekyll build
scripts.serve: npm run build:assets && LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 bundle exec jekyll serve --livereload
